message.content:
@startuml
participant "user" as u1
participant "app" as app1
participant "firestore" as fire1

u1 ..> app1 : press "New Case"
app1 ..> u1 : show case creation screen
u1 ..> app1 : enter details, press save
app1 ..> fire1 : send CaseTemporary(name, summary)
fire1 ..> app1 : return Case(id, name, summary, created_at, updated_at, submitted_at, submitted)
app1 ..> fire1 : save
fire1 ..> app1 : update local case details
app1 ..> u1 : transition to story list screen/case details screen

@enduml
